expectations.text: Entity class baseFieldDefinitions() calls parent::baseFieldDefinitions($entity_type) and assigns/merges the result into $fields (MUST call parent or id/uuid/langcode base fields are lost, causing entity creation to silently fail with missing primary key)
expectations.evidence: KnowledgeResource.php line 53: '$fields = parent::baseFieldDefinitions($entity_type);' — result assigned to $fields, then custom fields are merged in and $fields is returned on line 139.

expectations.text: Base fields that should appear in forms use setDisplayOptions('form', [...]) with widget type (without this call, fields are invisible in entity add/edit forms even though they exist in the database)
expectations.evidence: KnowledgeResource.php: related_topic (line 59-67, type 'entity_reference_autocomplete'), author (line 81-89, type 'entity_reference_autocomplete'), and resource_type (line 107-109, type 'options_select') all call setDisplayOptions('form', [...]) with a widget type.

expectations.text: Base fields that should appear in entity view use setDisplayOptions('view', [...]) with formatter type (without this, entity view mode renders nothing for these fields)
expectations.evidence: KnowledgeResource.php: related_topic (line 68-73, type 'entity_reference_label'), author (line 90-95, type 'entity_reference_label'), resource_type (line 111-115, type 'list_default'), created (line 122-126, type 'timestamp'), changed (line 133-136, type 'timestamp') all call setDisplayOptions('view', [...]) with formatter types.

expectations.text: Entity annotation/attribute includes route_provider handler pointing to AdminHtmlRouteProvider or DefaultHtmlRouteProvider (auto-generates CRUD routes from links array instead of hand-writing each entity route in .routing.yml)
This is a content entity per the prompt -- does NOT include config_export key in the annotation/attribute (config_export is for ConfigEntityType only, including it on a content entity causes errors)
expectations.evidence: KnowledgeResource.php annotation (lines 13-43) uses @ContentEntityType and contains no 'config_export' key anywhere in the annotation.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en knowledge_resource returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command output: '[notice] Already installed: knowledge_resource' with EXIT:0 — module was already enabled successfully.

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to the KnowledgeResource entity add form -- verify the form renders with fields for related_topic, author, resource_type (dropdown with article/research_paper/tool/documentation options), and created (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: eval-browser report: 'Add form at /knowledge-resource/add. Fields: Related Topic, Author, Resource Type dropdown with Article/Research Paper/Tool/Documentation. HTTP 200.' passed: true.

expectations.text: Navigate to the KnowledgeResource entity list page -- verify the list builder page loads without errors (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: eval-browser report: 'List page at /knowledge-resource. HTTP 200, list builder functional.' passed: true.

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs result provided: 0 errors, 0 warnings. PASSES.
